marquee.nurseryLowerUpper: Mai Kula • Firamare ta Ƙasa • Firamare ta Sama

about.heading1: Makaranta inda ake sanin kowane yaro, ganinsa, da

stats.title: Shekaru goma sha shida na tasiri da ake iya auna

whyUs.badge: Dalilin Da Iyaye Ke Zaɓen Mu
whyUs.description: Daga ƙananan abubuwan kulawar yau da kullun zuwa manyan mafarkai na wani Glider da ya kammala — kowane sashi na makarantarmu an tsara shi don taimaka wa yaron ku ya tashi.

academics.description: Daga mamakin Mai Kula zuwa ƙarfin Firamare 6, hanyarmu ta matakai uku tana jagorantar kowane Glider ta tsarin karuntu mai kyau, mai farin ciki, kuma marubuciyan Afirka.
academics.highlights: Abubuwan da suka fi daukar hankali

faculty.description: Masu takarda, masu sha'awa, kuma masu kulawa sosai — malamaimu su ne rai na Trail Gliders. Suna ba da shawara, suna ba da kwarin gwiwa, kuma suna tafiya tare da kowane yaro.

admissions.paragraph: Ko kun fito daga Mai Kula ko kuna canja zuwa Firamare 5, muna yin tafiyar shiga cikin dumi, gaskiya, da maraba.
admissions.scholarships: Guraben karatu ga daliban da suka fi kowa
admissions.admissionsReplies: Tawagar mu ta shiga ta amsa cikin awanni 24.

faq.description: Duk abin da kuke buƙatar sani game da rayuwa a Trail Gliders. Ba za ku iya samun amsarku ba? Tuntuɓi tawagarmu a kowane lokaci.

contact.description: Kuna da tambaya game da shiga, shirye-shirye, ko rayuwar makaranta? Tuntuɓi mu — tawagarmu za ta amsa cikin rana aiki ɗaya.
contact.formDescription: Cika fom ɗin da ke ƙasa za mu koma muku cikin gaggawa.
contact.subject: Ina sha'awar
contact.messagePlaceholder: Faɗi mana game da yaron ku da abin da kuke so ku sani...
contact.messageReceived: An karɓi saƙon. Za mu amsa cikin awanni 24.
contact.messageSent: An aika saƙon! Za mu amsa cikin awanni 24.
contact.privacyNote: Ta hanyar aikawa, kun amince da a tuntuɓe ku daga Trail Gliders Academy.
contact.protectedSpam: An karewa daga robota ta atomatik

footer.readyTitle: A shirye kuke don kallon yaron ku
footer.readyDesc: Kofar shiga don zangon 2026/2027 yanzu an buɗe. Shirya ziyara yau.
footer.subscribed: Kun bi! Kula da akwatin wasiƙarku don sabbin Glider.
footer.comingSoon: Yana zuwa nan ba da daɗewa ba
